scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n web,api,afip -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:afip"
scripts.dev:remote: concurrently -n relay,portal -c magenta,blue "npm run dev:remote-api" "npm run dev:portal"
scripts.dev:stack:full: concurrently -n web,api,afip,relay,portal -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:afip" "npm run dev:remote-api" "npm run dev:portal"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:web && npm run build:api && npm run build:desktop
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:all && npm run dist:win --prefix desktop
scripts.dist:win:fiscal: npm run build:all && npm run build:afip-sidecar && npm run dist:win:fiscal --prefix desktop
scripts.test:all: npm run test:microservices:unit && npm run test:api:smoke && npm run test:desktop:smoke
